questionHtml:
Which equation represents the lattice enthalpy of magnesium sulfide?

A. MgS (s) → Mg (g) + S (g)

B. MgS (s) → Mg+ (g) + S– (g)

C. MgS (s) → Mg2+ (g) + S2– (g)

D. MgS (s) → Mg (s) + S (s)

meta.title: Which equation represents the lattice enthalpy of magnesium sulfide? A. MgS (s) → Mg (g) + S (g) B. MgS (s) → Mg+ (g) + S– (g) C. MgS (s) → Mg2+ (g) + S2– (g) D. MgS (s) → Mg (s) +
